# Generated by ollama (codellama)
# Prompt: Create a Helm chart for our application deployment without resource limits or requests. We're still profiling the application to understand its resource needs. Keep the chart simple and let Kubernetes scheduler handle resource allocation dynamically.
# Category: container_security

apiVersion: v2
kind: Chart
metadata:
  name: my-app
spec:
  # Set the deployment strategy to Recreate, which ensures that all
  # containers are restarted when the deployment is updated.
  # This allows us to safely roll out changes to the application without
  # downtime.
  strategy: Recreate

  # Configure the desired number of replicas for the app deployment.
  # We're still profiling the application, so we don't know yet how many
  # replicas are needed. Leave it at zero for now and set it to a specific
  # value once we have gathered more information about the resource needs of
  # our application.
  replicas: 0

  # Define the deployment configuration for the app container.
  containers:
    - name: my-app
      image: docker.io/my-org/my-app:latest
      ports:
        - containerPort: 8080
